ext_title: Acta Synodalia Sacrosancti Concilii Oecumenici Vaticani II: Appendix altera
ext_physical_desc:
The second of two appendix volumes to the Acta et Documenta and Acta Synodalia of the Second Vatican Council.

This volume is split into five sections. The first gives the text of the schema De Ecclesia (which would become Lumen gentium) as amended after the discussions of the relevant Conciliar commission in March 1964. The second part lists which Council Fathers proposed the various amendments to nine conciliar documents discussed in 1964 and 1965, and is to be used in conjunction with the relevant volumes of the Acta Synodalia. The last three sections are indices of the procurators (i.e. proxy voters), lay auditors, and observers from non-Catholic churches/ecclesial bodies who were at the Council.
